title: Vampirism.co Peculiarities
description: This mod is a tiny add-on for Vampirism.co that adds a few quirks here and there, nothing too special.
body:
![# Vampirism.co - Your Supernatural Realm](https://vampirism.co/files/banner_castle.png)

### This mod is a tiny add-on for Vampirism.co that adds a few quirks here and there, nothing too special.
